instances.linkTitle: Second International Workshop on 'Near-field Optical Imaging and Spectroscopy' 2024

notes: Two structural variants exist: (1) older pages have separate .ev-date, .ev-time, and .ev-venue sibling divs inside .details; (2) newer pages nest .ev-venue inside .ev-date and include an inline arrow icon in the title link. The venueCombinedWithDate boolean controls which layout is rendered. The ev-time element is only present in older-style cards when a time is separately specified. The .link-arrow/.scarrow section with the arrow icon is always present.
